Combinations
Accept
Raberto: Hey Bob! Wake up!
Bob: What's going on? I was dreaming about extra cheese...
Raberto: The kingdom is in danger! Someone stole the Sacred Pizza.
Bob: No way! Not the sacred crust!
Raberto: Take these tokens, go to my shop, and prepare yourself.
Bob: That monster looks like raw dough...
Raberto: Watch out! It loves to ram. Use your spells wisely and watch your fatigue!
Bob: Ugh, this one smells like expired pepperoni.
Raberto: It keeps its distance. Get close when you have an opening!
Bob: Why does it have pineapple? This is sacrilege!
Raberto: Watch out for the acidic juice! Keep moving.
Bob: The Fast Food King himself!
Raberto: This is the final battle Bob. Don't hold anything back!
Bob: Take that! One less slice to worry about.
Raberto: Well done. Come by the shop to rest up and spend those tokens.
Raberto: Are you sure? You're going to face the boss without spending your tokens...
